arts.ttl: How Everton can close gap on Merseyside rivals Liverpool after decades trailing behind them
arts.sum: Everton were bigger than Liverpool until the early 1970s, but have not won a trophy since 1995 and have been handicapped by money troubles - with the Toffees facing their rivals on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Liverpool line-ups for Everton as Trent Alexander-Arnold and Darwin Nunez decisions made
arts.sum: Our Liverpool writers select their line-ups for tonight's historic Merseyside derby against Everton at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Arsenal dealt another major injury blow in Premier League title race with Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool's main Premier League title rivals Arsenal have been handed another significant injury blow.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Premier League leaders 'seriously considering' Nice winger Mohamed-Ali Cho
arts.sum: Liverpool are allegedly giving serious consideration to making an approach for Nice winger Mohamed-Ali Cho during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: ‘I think’: Jamie Carragher predicts if Liverpool will win the Champions League this season
arts.sum: Liverpool could be on course for a truly historic season this term under Arne Slot. Indeed, the Reds are top of the Premier League as...

arts.ttl: John Arne Riise completes incredible 24-HOUR 106-mile treadmill run after Liverpool legend's remarkable body transformation
arts.sum: And, over the weekend, Riise - who also counts the likes of Roma, Monaco and Fulham among his former clubs - took part in perhaps his toughest challenge yet.

arts.ttl: The reason Everton vs Liverpool is on TV on Champions League night as SPFL handed way to avoid another blackout
arts.sum: The final ever Merseyside derby at Goodison is up against Celtic vs Bayern Munich on the box tonight

arts.ttl: There aren't many players who can say what I can about Everton and Liverpool
arts.sum: Our reporter Harry Crichton speaks to Merseyside football legend Steve McMahon before the last-ever derby at Goodison Park between his former clubs Everton and Liverpool

arts.ttl: I was next to Mo Salah as Jurgen Klopp said he was leaving – he started laughing
arts.sum: Liverpool confirmed in January 2024 that Jurgen Klopp would step down as manager at the end of the season - but Mohamed Salah's gut reaction to the news caught one star off guard

arts.ttl: Everton saw two bids for player rejected in January – Club want big sale as Premier League hovers
arts.sum: Everton were interested in a move for Freiburg midfielder Merlin Röhl in the January transfer window. That’s according to Sport BILD, who report that Everton made two bids for the 22-year-old but were turned away by the German side. The newspaper explains that Röhl has been impressing for Freiburg since joining in a €2.9m deal The post Everton saw two bids for player rejected in January – Club want big sale as Premier League hovers appeared first on Sport Witness.
